name: Oussama Maache
title: Full-Stack Engineer & AI Developer
summary: Final-year engineering student specializing in AI and Information Systems, with hands-on experience building full-stack applications and LLM-powered pipelines.

bullets: Built and maintained features on a MedusaJS + React stack serving B2B clients
Designed RAG pipeline with LangChain and ChromaDB to automate product descriptions
Implemented CI/CD workflows with Docker reducing deployment time by 40%
Led a team of 4 on a real-time fact-checking platform (Verifact Live)
Designed microservices architecture with Spring Boot, Kafka, and Docker Compose

projects.name: Verifact Live
projects.description: Real-time fact-checking platform with Angular 17, Spring Boot, Kafka, PostgreSQL, Groq Whisper
highlights: Processed audio streams in real-time using Groq Whisper API
Built event-driven architecture with Kafka handling 1000+ events/sec

projects.name: E-commerce Automation Agent
projects.description: Self-hosted n8n workflow: abandoned cart recovery with Telegram alerts, Ollama emails, Gmail, Google Sheets
highlights: Reduced cart abandonment follow-up time from hours to seconds
Integrated local LLM (Ollama) for personalized email generation

projects.name: RAG Pipeline — DECQ
projects.description: LangChain + ChromaDB pipeline for automated product description generation
highlights: Cut manual content creation time by 60%
Integrated Groq Cloud LLM with custom chunking strategy
